entity.summary: French centralized crypto-asset marketplace providing euro-funded buying, selling and exchange services, Bitcoin limit-order trading, recurring purchases, over-the-counter execution, and business access.
entity.notes: Current first-party platform exposes active account opening, euro funding, crypto buying and selling, Bitcoin limit orders, recurring purchases, OTC service, and business access. Paymium also reports current French MiCA CASP authorisation. Independent exchange data reports a recently updated BTC/EUR market with non-zero volume. No exact launch date, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Paymium French crypto platform and current services
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes active individual and professional crypto services, euro funding, buying and selling, recurring purchases, OTC transactions, and French MiCA authorisation.

evidence.title: Paymium BTC-EUR market and exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current independent exchange profile lists a recently updated BTC/EUR spot market with non-zero 24-hour volume, supporting active classification.
